import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { useEffect } from "react"; import "./styles/Home.css"; function Home() { const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { const elements = document.querySelectorAll(".reveal"); const observer = new IntersectionObserver( entries => { entries.forEach(entry => { if (entry.isIntersecting) { entry.target.classList.add("active"); } }); }, { threshold: 0.15 } ); elements.forEach(el => observer.observe(el)); }, []); return (
{/* HERO */}

Where stories
sleep in shelves.

A calm digital library where books are discovered, remembered, and quietly treasured.

{/* TRENDING BOOKS */}

New & Trending

{[ { id: 1, title: "The Last Thing He Told Me", author: "Laura Dave", cover: "https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/10523364-L.jpg", }, { id: 2, title: "Malibu Rising", author: "Taylor Jenkins Reid", cover: "https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/10594755-L.jpg", }, { id: 3, title: "Black Ice", author: "Brad Thor", cover: "https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/11153202-L.jpg", }, { id: 4, title: "Blind Tiger", author: "Sandra Brown", cover: "https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/10909258-L.jpg", }, ].map(book => (
navigate("/book-details", { state: book }) } >

{book.title}

{book.author}

))}
{/* ABOUT */}

Why BookSphere?

Designed for students and librarians who value clarity, organisation, and quiet focus.

📚 Smart Collections

Track books, genres, and availability with ease.

🧑‍🎓 Student Friendly

Search, borrow, and manage your reading history.

🛠 Librarian Control

Add, edit, and manage books without complexity.

{/* ABOUT SECTION */} {/* ABOUT SECTION */}

Designed for modern libraries

BookSphere is a digital library management system built with students and librarians in mind. It focuses on simplicity, clarity, and calm productivity.

📚 Organized Collections

Easily manage books, genres, and availability.

🧑‍🎓 Student Friendly

Search, borrow, and track reading history.

🛠 Librarian Control

Add, update, and manage books effortlessly.

{/* FOOTER */}

BookSphere • Crafted for learning • 2026

); } export default Home;
